full_text:
Fa Zhen (Gaoqing) 法真 (高卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fa Zhen (法真), styledGaoqing (高卿), was born in Youfufeng. A distinguished scholar but refused all office. A quiet man with few desires. Fa Zhen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Fa Zhen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
